title: Ampelocissus erioclada
intro: Ampelocissus erioclada, also known as the tropical grapevine, is a deciduous climber native to tropical Africa, characterized by its woody stems and compound leaves. The plant has been found to possess various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and protect against oxidative stress. The bioactive constituents of Ampelocissus erioclada include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and triterpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. In traditional medicine, the plant is often used to prepare herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to treat fever, respiratory issues, and skin conditions.
taxonomy: Ampelocissus erioclada is a species of flowering plant in the family Vitaceae. The plant belongs to the genus Ampelocissus and is native to tropical Africa. It is a climber or a shrub, typically found in woodland edges, grasslands, and rocky outcrops. Further classification places it within the order Rhamnales and the clade Rosidae. Its classification is a key aspect of understanding its evolutionary history and relationships with other plants.
uses: Ampelocissus erioclada is reported to have various medicinal properties, although specific uses may vary depending on the region and cultural context. It is said to be used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The plant's extracts may be used to treat a range of health issues, including skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory problems. Some studies suggest that Ampelocissus erioclada contains compounds with potential anti-cancer properties. However, further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for medicinal use.
benefits: Ampelocissus erioclada, commonly known as the Indian grape vine, has been studied for its potential health benefits, including its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is believed to have anti-diabetic and anti-obesity effects due to its ability to regulate blood sugar levels and suppress fat accumulation. More studies are required to fully understand the health benefits and potential applications of Ampelocissus erioclada.

Studies have shown that the plant possesses antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds, which may help in reducing oxidative stress and inflammation in the body. parts: Ampelocissus erioclada, a plant with potential medicinal properties, has various parts that are used for traditional remedies.
